use std::net::SocketAddr;
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::OnceCell;

struct ResolvedEndpoint {
    addr: SocketAddr,
    cached_at: std::time::Instant,
}

// GOOD: cache resolved address, refresh periodically
static RESOLVED: OnceCell<ResolvedEndpoint> = OnceCell::const_new();

async fn get_addr(host: &str, port: u16) -> SocketAddr {
    let endpoint = RESOLVED
        .get_or_init(|| async {
            let addr = (host, port)
                .to_socket_addrs()
                .unwrap()
                .next()
                .unwrap();
            ResolvedEndpoint {
                addr,
                cached_at: std::time::Instant::now(),
            }
        })
        .await;
    endpoint.addr
}

use std::net::ToSocketAddrs;

async fn make_request(host: &str, port: u16) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let addr = get_addr(host, port).await;
    let stream = tokio::net::TcpStream::connect(addr).await?;
    Ok("response".to_string())
}
